TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_New_Zealand, title = New_Zealand, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/New_Zealand} }

S.FORM: New zealand Itini i 41 00 S, 174 00 E, noOsiniya ko New zealand. Polong no sekalay i 268,838 sq km "saka 76 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 264,537 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 4,301 sq km " Polong i 4,474,549 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 43.20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 31.40%, malo no roma to a sera 25.40%. siyoto O ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakatosa 6 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Elizabeth II , patirengan a romi'ad i 1952 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 6 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: n…ôw *…ôa…ĺan…¨~…ģ itini i ** ** s, *** ** …ô, no~uo~usinija ko~u n…ôw *…ôa…ĺan…¨~…ģ. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakato~usa * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i …ô…ĺi*ab~b~v…ôtńß ii , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: New zealand Itini i 41 00 S, 174 00 E, noOsiniya ko New zealand. Polong no sekalay i 268,838 sq km "saka 76 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 264,537 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 4,301 sq km " Polong i 4,474,549 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 43.20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 31.40%, malo no roma to a sera 25.40%. siyoto O ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakatosa 6 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Elizabeth II , patirengan a romi'ad i 1952 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 6 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakato~usa * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i …ô…ĺi*ab~b~v…ôtńß ii , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
